prompt: Modern dark isometric tech infographic showing the data flow of a job-discovery engine, left to right. Top-left: a glowing GREEN panel labeled 'KEYWORD APIs' with a magnet icon, listing indeed, adzuna, careerjet, jooble, themuse, linkedin, rss. Top-right: a glowing ORANGE panel labeled 'ATS PORTALS' with a building icon, listing greenhouse, lever, personio, factorial. Both panels feed arrows down into a central BLUE vertical funnel-shaped pipeline of 6 glowing stages stacked top to bottom: fetch, normalize, dedup, MinHash, quality rules, score. The pipeline bottom connects to a RED database cylinder labeled 'Supabase JOBS' with a small infinity clock symbol meaning permanent storage no expiry. An arrow goes right from the cylinder to a VIOLET panel labeled 'rank-jobs' with a filter funnel icon. Clean neon lines on near-black background, professional architecture diagram for a presentation, crisp short labels.
negative_prompt: blurry, distorted, cluttered, photorealistic people, watermark, signature, low quality, oversaturated, paragraphs of text, gibberish text, misspelled words

composition.background: near-black dark dashboard with subtle grid
